mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.role_code AS roleCode, r.role_name AS roleName, r.data_scope AS dataScope, r.status, r.remark FROM sys_role r WHERE r.deleted = 0
AND ( r.role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND r.status = #{status}
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
